component.name: MultiFlexi AbraFlexi
component.summary: AbraFlexi ERP credential prototype for MultiFlexi

description.p: Provides the AbraFlexi ERP credential prototype for MultiFlexi core, defining the URL, login, password and company configuration fields required to connect to an AbraFlexi server.
Also ships a web UI component with a connection dialog that tests server connectivity, validates authentication and lists available companies.
